name: Winter Squash, Apple and Walnut Soup
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces Frozen pureed winter squash (butternut), defrosted
½ cup Toasted walnut pieces - for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the toasted walnut pieces in a large saucepan.
2. Stir to blend well.
3. Cook the soup over medium heat until warmed through, about 6 to 8 minutes.
4. Ladle the soup into bowls and add a few chopped toasted walnut pieces in the center.
